creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Send this to your travel buddy! ✌🏽

Tarpon Springs, Florida, is known as Florida’s Little Greece 🇬🇷 because of the large Greek population that lives here and it’s also the Sponge Capital of the World! 😳🧽

Coffee ☕️ 
Urban Grounds

Food 🍲 
Rusty Bellies

Drinks 🍹 
Twisted Orange

Dessert 🧁
Hellas Bakery

To Do: 🚶‍♀️
Explore the Sponge Docks
Shop for sponges plucked right from the river
Do a tour at Tarpon Springs Distillery 
Play vintage games at Replay Museum 

Have you been here??
